form.formComment: Entire returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign third of 11 at this track January 26 over 1200m, 6 len behind Kotorino Saezuri with 56kg at $6. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 3.5 len win. This track December 30 over 1200m defeating Owsla Flag carrying 56kg at $14.10. Likely to feature.
